conbody.p: Overview: A CDI Dashboard report helps the CDI Director to view the trend of various productivity and financial metrics over time and analyze the overall performance of the CDI program. The dashboard also helps you group data by week, month, quarter, and year and analyze trends over different time periods and analyze them more easily.

The report provides answers to the following questions.
Has the overall review rate improved over time?
Has the impact clarification rate improved over time?
Have the provider response and agreed rate improved over time?
How is my CMI trending month to month?
How do I pinpoint the root cause of a downward shift in CMI?
Is the CDI program resulting in SOI/ROM category shift?
What is the trend around Reimbursement Impact of the CDI program?
Am I performing above or below my goals?
How do we show the financial impact of the cases post reconciliation?
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Executive Summary CDI Dashboard

CDI Dashboard displays the following:
CDI Dashboard Tabular Chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the tabular chart.
For filters on all pages refer .

Default Display: By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters discharged in the last three calendar months. Click the ‘Reset’ button to reset the discharge date and select the required date.
Columns in the chart display the selected View By option.
Total column displays the row-level grand totals for the selected period. For the percentage metrics, this column displays the overall percentage for the selected period.
The CDI Dashboard chart shows the following metrics:

row.entry: Displays the total discharges for the selected 'View By' option.
Total Encounters = The total count of encounters that have a Discharge Date/time assigned.

entry.p: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.

row.entry: Displays the total reviews for the selected View By option.
Encounters Reviewed = The count of encounters with an initial review date/time.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of total encounters reviewed for the selected View By option.

entry.p: Formula: Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Discharges) x 100.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the selected View By option.

entry.p: Formula: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED./ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters at least one financial impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the selected View By option.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the percentage of sent clarifications responded by the providers for each View By option.

entry.p: Formula: Overall Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Displays the percentage of responded clarifications agreed by the providers for each View By option.

entry.p: Formula: Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
By default displays the CMI Before CDI for inpatient encounter with discharges in the last 9 calendar months.

entry.p: CMI Before CDI = The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters and Reconciliation assessment DRG WT (or Working DRG WT when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals. E.g. 2.1868

entry.p: By default displays the CMI After CDI for inpatient encounters with discharges in the last 9 calendar months.

CMI After CDI= The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria.

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals. E.g. 2.1868

row.entry: Displays the aggregated value if a particular payer and facility is not selected.
By default displays the CMI Shift % for inpatient encounters with discharges in the last 9 calendar months.

entry.p: CMI Shift % = (The sum of CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria) / (CMI Before CDI for Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-No Impact, , Reconciled-Impact (SOI/ROM Impact) Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria). X 100.
Format: Line

row.entry: By default displays the Reimbursement Impact ($) for inpatient encounters with discharges in the last 9 calendar months.

entry.p: Reimbursement Impact ($) = The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) (CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) x Blended Rate) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0)

p.note: Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters without a shift in the WT (F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT = 0 or F-DRG = R-DRG WT) are not considered in the numerator.

entry.p: Displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI (SOI After > SOI Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters.
Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

row.entry:
Displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the ROM(ROM After > ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

% cases with ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC.
Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC.
Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CD = The sum of CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CD = The sum of CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Complication Rate Before CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Complication Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CD = The sum of CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Complication Rate After CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Complication Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).
Displays the average of GMLOS Before CDI for the selected View By option.

GMLOS Before CDI = The sum of GMLOS values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the GMLOS values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 1.41)
Displays the average of GMLOS After CDI for the selected View By option.

GMLOS After CDI = The sum of GMLOS values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 3.60).
Displays the average of GMLOS Variance for the selected View By option.
GMLOS Variance = GMLOS After CDI - GMLOS Before CDI

row.entry: % Encounters with CC to MCC Shift

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC for the selected View By option.
% Encounters with CC to MCC Shift = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100.

row.entry: Encounters with CC to MCC Shift
Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC.
% Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC for the selected View By option.

% Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100

row.entry: Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC

entry.p: Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC.

row.entry:
This option is selected by default. When you click this option, Group By and Week Start Day filters automatically become available for selection.
When the Discharge Month option is selected, all the charts in the dashboard displays the data by Discharge Month.
Displayed on: X-axis.When the ‘View By’ is Discharge Month, the data in all the charts is sorted by Discharge Month in ascending order.

entry.p: When the Facility option is selected, all the charts in the dashboard displays the data by Facility.
When the ‘View By’ is Facility, the data in all the charts is sorted by Facility name in ascending order.
Displayed on: X-axis.
When the Payer option is selected, all the charts in the dashboard displays the data by Payer
When the ‘View By’ is Payer, the data in all the charts is sorted by Payer desc in ascending order.
Displayed on: X-axis.

ul.li: You can select date from the lookup provided.
Default: Last 9 calendar months date range selected by default.
With the Reset button, you can reset the discharge date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Discharge Date.
Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that you have access to.
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities you have access to.
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
This filter displays the list of available units.

row.entry:
These options are available only when the View By option is selected as Admit Date/Discharge Date.
See .

ul.li: Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Displays the list of available units.
Displays the list of available admit service.
You can search the Admit Service.
Displays the available patient types.Example: ED, IP, etc.
You can select multiple Visit Type.
You can search the Visit Type.
Displays the available DRG Specialties. Example : Transplant, Surgery, Neurosurgery.
You can search the DRG Specialty.

entry.p: Total Encounters= Count of inpatient discharges with status other than 'Review Not Needed'.
Encounters Reviewed= Count of encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.
Review Rate= (Encounters Reviewed/ Total Encounters) x 100. E.g. 89%

row.entry: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/ Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)) x100. E.g. 33%

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) ) x 100). E.g. 30%

Provider Response Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine/Count of Clarifications Sent) x100. E.g. 90%
Provider Agreed Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed/Count of Clarifications Responded) x100. E.g. 90%

The avg. of R-DRG WTs (or W-DRG WT if R-DRG is blank) of all Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial Impact) encounters and F-DRG WTs of all Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) and Auto Reconciled encounters.
The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.
Displays the aggregated CMI Value applicable for CDE for each payer category as provided by the customer. Select the specific Payer and Facility to look at the exact configured CMI value

entry.p: CMI Shift = (CMI After - CMI Before);
CMI Shift(%) = (CMI After - CMI Before)/CMI Before X 100. E.g. 3.14%.

row.entry: Reimbursement Impact ($) = The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) (CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) x Blended Rate) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0).

entry.p: % cases with SOI Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with SOI After > SOI Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100.
% cases with ROM Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with ROM After >ROM Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100.

row.entry: The count of Reconciled encounters (Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) x 100.

The count of Reconciled encounters (Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) x 100.

The avg. of CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled-No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria.

The avg. of CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria . (Rounded 2 decimal places E.g., 0.84%).

The avg. of CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled-No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria.

The avg. of CareChex Exp. Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria . (Rounded 2 decimal places E.g., 0.84%).

The avg. of CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled-No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Exp. Mortality Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria.

The avg. of CareChex Exp. Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria . (Rounded 2 decimal places E.g., 0.84%).

entry.p: % Encounters with CC to MCC Shift = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100.

% Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100.

row.entry: The average of GMLOS values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the GMLOS values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria.

The average of GMLOS values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria. Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 3.60.
